nodes.label: AI as creative jumping-off point

nodes.grounding_span: It gave me a list, but then I couldnt find like 90% of them because they were fabricated

nodes.label: Teacher's contextual knowledge vs AI's generality
nodes.grounding_span: I know my students better than any AI model could

nodes.label: Skill of editing AI output
nodes.grounding_span: my skills of extracting the information and editing it to be specific to my needs is a skill that AI hasn't taken over yet
